title: clutia alaternoides
intro: Clutia alaternoides, also known as the Ceylon sterculia or sterculia, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, particularly in Sri Lanka and India. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clutia alaternoides include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Clutia alaternoides is often prepared as a decoction, powder, or ointment, and is also used in the production of herbal supplements and traditional remedies.
